programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: As Stan continues to dominate the household, Francine finds herself idolising a group of women who seem to have it all. She tries to impress them and even lies in order to gain acceptance into their group, until she realises they aren't as perfect as they seem.

programme.title: American Dad!

programme.title: American Dad!

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: The granddaughter of a famous botanist asks Rosemary and Laura to tidy the garden and reorganise her grandfather's seed museum, but when a mysterious Latin man is found dead on the premises, the women realise that there is more to the seed museum than meets the eye.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: A former boyfriend of Rosemary's invites her and Laura to his home near Malaga to help create an Arabic garden. Then, one of the local residents is found dead, and their mysterious landowner is the chief suspect. Rosemary's ex declares his continuing love for her, but she has his jealous wife to contend with.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Miss Marple arrives at the luxurious Bertram's Hotel, but soon discovers that there are dark secrets lurking below the highly polished veneer. When one of the maids is murdered, she tries to learn the truth before the murderer strikes again, but the truth is far more sinister than even she is prepared for.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body drops out of a plane and is discovered in a reservoir, Barnaby and Nelson find that the world of stunt pilots and aviation heroes hides many dark secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the boss of Calder's Biscuit Company is murdered in Copenhagen, Barnaby and Nelson join forces with two female Danish detectives, the abrasive and astute Poulsen and the charming and cool Degn, and they discover Eric Calder had more linking him to Copenhagen than just his famous Golden Clusters.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The crime drama returns for a new series. The unveiling of a newly-discovered novel by deceased Midsomer crime-writer George Summersbee at the Luxton Deeping Crime Festival is jeopardised when the manuscript is stolen and a woman is fatally electrocuted by a booby-trapped roulette wheel. Can new dad Barnaby untangle a web of jealousy and obsession to find the killer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Pastry chef Chrissie Larkton's mill has been in her family for centuries. She restored it and turned it into a thriving online business, but the popularity has overshadowed Lower Blissingham, and many of the villagers are not happy about it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa wins her first star for making a wonderful drawing of her house. Dad realises that he has never won a single star and is determined to solve the problem.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bull's Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family have all gone to the caves for a day out and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide! Peppa and George are excited to see the pretty caves and go through the underground lakes. Daddy Pig must be at his bravest on this trip to go on the scary `Ride of Doom'!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig show and share with Peppa and George their toys and hobbies. Granny her special doll from childhood and Grandpa his love of building toy planes. Peppa and George have great fun when Grandpa reveals his new biggest plane ever that even George can fit in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes. After trying on lots of new exciting outfits George finds an outfit that suits him just right!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig have gone to visit Madame Gazelle. The family soon realise that her house is being pushed over by the tall tree next to it. Mr. Bull arrives and with his help they all manage to save Madame Gazelle's House and tree.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete. Peppa, Mummy and George all decide to go with Daddy and enjoy a train journey, where they sing to pass the time and even have a sleep on the train.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Sheep gets the news that she has got a new job far away, leaving Suzy and Peppa to wonder how they're going to carry on being best friends; Peppa gives Suzy some presents to remember her by, before a surprising change for Mummy Sheep changes everything.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's time for a day out and Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and Suzy Sheep all go to visit Tiny Land. They see tiny dinosaurs, their favourite tiny landmarks and even a tiny Miss Rabbit doing even more jobs!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a shop. They quickly find it is very tiring.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro gets a cough at playschool and the other children soon catch it. Doctor Brownbear is called and gives them horrible medicine, but who will look after him when he is ill?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go on holiday in a special van. Peppa is surprised to find that at a push of a button the van turns into a little house for them to sleep in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are on holiday in their camper van. They decide to go to Duck Land, a special park where they can see the ducks in the river, and are surprised when their van turns into a boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Worms inside the bin turn the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep plays with Peppa. The boys don't want to play the same games as the girls, but they all agree that they like jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's a snowy day and Peppa's family build an igloo for their snowman. They hide in it during a snowstorm, but Penny Polar Bear and her parents love snowstorms - and also Peppa's igloo!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in too - which turns Daddy's shirt pink.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send Polly Parrot for help when their boat runs aground. Polly fetches Granny Pig and Granddad Dog to rescue them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Delphine the Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to playgroup, where they teach her the `Bing Bong Song'.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Mummy Pig helps out at Miss Rabbit's fire station, she is called upon to douse the flames at Daddy Pig's out-of-control barbecue.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa brings home a teddy from playgroup to look after, but she is worried that he will not have a very exciting time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is Danny Dog's birthday, and with the help of Grandad Dog and Grandpa Pig the children take part in a pirate treasure hunt.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: All the people in Peppa's town are excited to meet Mr Potato when he comes to open a new sports centre.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her friends on a train ride where they must tick off what they see on their activity sheets.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig shows Peppa and George her poultry. Elsewhere, something has been eating Grandpa Pig's lettuces.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: At Peppa's playgroup, Madame Gazelle wants everyone to show the class their special talent.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's family go to the museum's moon exhibition with George's friend, Edmond Elephant.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food. Peppa, George, and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's playschool.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are trying to get to the playground, but Mr Bull's roadworks are in the way.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster visits the school and brings some animals with her. Binky the Tortoise is very popular - but ends up needing to be rescued by Miss Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the seaside where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig gives her old computer to Granny and Grandpa Pig. They use it for lots of important work - as well as Happy Mrs Chicken, but who will fix it when it breaks?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is poorly in hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit gives Mummy Pig, Peppa and George a ride in her rescue helicopter. Daddy Pig is very sad to escape all the fun - but Miss Rabbit makes sure that doesn't happen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Baby Alexander is too young to talk, until Peppa teaches him his first word.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit has hurt her ankle, so her sister and her friends offer to fill in for her at the ice cream stand, the supermarket - and everywhere else she works.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Club - going on secret missions, and doing secret things, but soon everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. There's lots of crashing and banging at first, but it's not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig needs a new watch, Mr Fox finds three grandfather clocks in the back of his van. Three clocks are much better than one. Mr Fox has everything in his van - even a chicken.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children don't want to play any `baby' games.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children to Grampy Rabbit's gym class, where they learn how to be real explorers.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pig's garden to make a pie.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Some of Daddy Pig's important work papers have gone missing - because Mummy Pig, Peppa and George have accidentally made them into paper aeroplanes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephant's birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than they'd thought.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: The Biggest Muddy Puddle in the World
programme.desc: Peppa and George wake up one morning to find that all the rain has made a flood, and their house is now a desert island.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park where there is lots of fun to be had with vegetables.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbours are going to be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches the children how to play basketball, and it is not long before they are good enough to take on a much bigger team.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is much excitement when Mr Zebra delivers a package from Aunt Dottie for Peppa and George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Hamster's pet tortoise Tiddles gets stuck up a tree. Who is going to come to the rescue?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Mr Fox's Shop to buy Granny and Grandpa an anniversary present, but what will they choose from the shop that sells everything?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and all her friends at playgroup dress up as different countries from all over the world.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches Peppa and George a fun game to play while they wait inside for the rain to stop.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is excited when Mummy Rabbit arrives with a big tummy and they learn that she is carrying a baby bunny inside - but it turns out they are in for an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig pops round with some seeds for Peppa and George to plant, with Daddy Pig helping out - by acting as a scarecrow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddy's birthday treat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. When George wakes up again, Peppa has to make up a bedtime story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have been on a trip to a mountain beauty spot. When Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a drain, Mr Bull offers to find them with his digger.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George pays a visit to Mr Fox's Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur, breaks. With all the additional features, surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Pig's Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Oh dear! Miss Rabbit's train has broken down and all her passengers need to get to work. So Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbit his little train, Gertrude.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Eek! There's a spider in the house. Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's family is staying at Cousin Chloe's house. It's been a long day and everyone is tired and sleepy, but baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and wishing well she's got for the garden. Peppa and George love them too, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Oh no! The children's favourite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving Playgroup. They are very sad to be losing her, but decide to throw a leaving party to give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's Award for Industry for all the hard work she does, and Peppa and her friends are to accompany her to the palace to meet the Queen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them. It makes him realise that he misses the sea after all.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After smelling Granny Pig's perfume de lavender, Peppa experiments with the flowers in the garden to create her own special smell.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa loves the school fete. Her favourite things are face painting, the balloons and the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium. With all the different fish there, surely Peppa can find a new friend for Goldie?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's a beautiful day but Peppa, George and Grandpa Pig are sitting inside watching the motor racing on the television! Granny Pig shoos them all outside to enjoy the sunshine. Inspired by the racing, Grandpa Pig builds George his own racing car.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is left behind when everyone takes Grampy Rabbit's little boat to the riverside picnic spot. Will someone remember him and save him some cake?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are busy building a desert island in a sandpit. They are all very proud of it, with its forest, lake, houses and shops. It's going splendidly, until George and Richard's dinosaurs turn up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's night time at Grandpa and Granny Pig's house, and Peppa and George have stayed up late to help hunt for slugs and snails, but what other night animals will they find?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Pig family are preparing to go on holiday. Peppa and George pack their favourite toys and Granny and Grandpa are left to look after Goldie the Fish.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy and discover that everyone is talking in a different language! Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult. It's all so very strange, but they are soon settled, and Peppa rings Granny and Grandpa Pig to check that Goldie the fish is happy too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are enjoying the first day in their Italian villa. On a trip to the local village, they find pizza to eat, presents to buy and a postcard to send to Goldie the fish.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but now it's time to go home. Suzy has missed Peppa very much and can't wait to see her. Peppa has missed her friend too and can't wait to see Goldie, her pet fish again.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George enjoys seeing his reflection in the mirror so much that he and Peppa try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The playgroup is going on an outing to the museum. Everyone is on the bus ready to go, except Pedro Pony - so where is he?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy are bored because they have nothing to do, so Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with, but not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is down at the lake as it's a perfect day to go boating. Miss Rabbit has all sorts of boats for hire and Daddy Pig picks one with pedals, but when all the families have a race, he soon wishes he had picked something easier to sail.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Mr Bull in a China Shop
programme.desc: While enjoying a tea break, Mr Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot. He takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit in the hope that she can mend it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's fruit day at the market and Miss Rabbit is making smoothies from people's favourite fruit. When she gives George a special `dinosaur' juice to make him big and strong.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: What's that strange creature hovering in the sky? It's George's dinosaur balloon, but little George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing pirates, but when they put together a treasure chest and bury it in a marked spot, Pedro soon realises that he needs to follow the trail. He's lost something.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's playgroup are really enjoying Grampy Rabbit's talk about space rockets, until suddenly he loses his voice. Can Doctor Brown Bear get him speaking again?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Grandpa Pig puts up a tent in his garden, Peppa and her friends decide that it's a perfect place to put on a circus. With Peppa as the ringmaster, the show can begin.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is looking forward to taking Peppa and George to visit a fish pond that he used to visit when he was a piglet. However, a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep some old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young, but they are pleased to see that they have always been best friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on Snowy Mountain learning how to ski. Their teacher, Madame Gazelle, is very good and was once a world champion, but in the end it is Mummy Pig who impresses everyone.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George has fun making bubbles, and Peppa has fun popping them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle introduces a new pupil to the playgroup, Emily Elephant, and everyone wants to be her friend because she's very good at building blocks and can make a very loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet Polly Parrot comes to stay, and Peppa and George love Polly Parrot, but when she flies away, no one knows what to do.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family share a picnic with Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra, but when it's time to go home, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George want to be famous detectives like their favourite television programme `Detective Potato', so daddy pig gives them a mystery to solve.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Rebecca Rabbit has a little brother called Richard who is the same age as George. George and Richard each have a toy dinosaur, but the boys are not very good at sharing their toys.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is planting seeds to make a flower garden, but the birds keep eating them, so Peppa and George help Grandpa Pig to make a scarecrow, which stops the birds eating Grandpa's seeds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle shows Peppa and her school friends how to make a time capsule, with each of them putting one of their favourite things in the capsule and burying it in the school garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the seaside with Granny and Grandpa Pig, and realise not all beaches are sandy. This one has lots of rocks and little rock pools to explore.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig teaches them how to recycle the bottles and newspapers, then they take everything to Miss Rabbit at the recycling plant.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are playing at the pond with their toy boats, but when Peppa and George's friends arrive, everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's family get caught in a very long traffic jam whilst on the way to have lunch with Granny and Grandpa Pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Before bed, Peppa and George take a bath, brush their teeth and listen to Daddy Pig read them a story. Finally, they're asleep and Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig can relax.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to animate their drawings at playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's friend Pedro wears glasses, and Peppa thinks she might need them too, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol, but Granddad Dog's garage is nearby, and with one call, Granddad Dog is on his way to help.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to the playground.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's playgroup is holding a jumble sale to raise money for a new roof and Madame Gazelle asks everyone to bring something to sell. Peppa, and each of her friends, bring in an old toy.

programme.desc: Peppa is playing with Candy Cat when Emily Elephant's Granny moves out of the apartment. When the new neighbours arrive, Peppa recognises her holiday friend Rohan Rhino.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies to get Mummy Rabbit's attention. Mummy Rabbit plays along until they admit they are not really babies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cat's Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings they've done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard day's work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesn't beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her family's adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in their pool. They help the garden animals cool down but when it rains, the animals are happy and so is Peppa. Rain makes muddy puddles for jumping in!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pig's Garden. Granny's friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn that it is not morning or winter where she is! Daddy Pig explains this using a big ball to represent the Earth.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emily's house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is confirming she is having a new baby. Mummy and Daddy Pig share the exciting news with Peppa and her brother, George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are on the search for a new home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family renovate their home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's family car breaks down. While it is being repaired, they borrow a shiny new one from Grandad Dog's garage.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is making a wicker basket. She explains it is her hobby - something you do to relax. The children discuss hobbies and learn about each other's favourite things to do.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pig's house. They find Mummy's old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides she'd like to make one for the baby!

programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!

programme.desc: Peppa and George go ice skating, but they have never been before, and Peppa keeps falling over.

programme.desc: When Peppa and George go to the dentist for a check-up, Dr Elephant says their teeth are nice and white, but George's toy dinosaur is in need of a tooth-clean.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett explores how the Normans developed from a band of marauding Vikings into the formidable warriors who conquered England in 1066. He tells how the Normans established their new province of Normandy - `land of the northmen' - in northern France. They went on to build some of the finest churches in Europe and turned into an unstoppable force of Christian knights and warriors.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: In the second of this three-part series, Professor Robert Bartlett explores the impact of the Norman Conquest of Britain and Ireland. Bartlett shows how William the Conqueror imposed a new aristocracy, savagely cut down opposition and built scores of castles and cathedrals to intimidate and control. He also commissioned the Domesday Book, the greatest national survey of England that had ever been attempted.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett explores the impact of the Normans on southern Europe and the Middle East. The Normans spread south in the 11th century, winning control of southern Italy and the island of Sicily. There they created their most prosperous kingdom, where Christianity and Islam co-existed in relative harmony and mutual tolerance, but events in the Middle East provoked the more aggressive side of the Norman character.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Dr Stephen Baxter reveals the human and political drama that lies within England's earliest surviving public record, the Domesday Book, which was commissioned by the Normans.

programme.title: The Mughal Empire
programme.desc: Building An Empire: In this episode we explore the legacy of Akbar, arguably the greatest of all Mughal emperors, and what he left behind. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: The Mughal Empire
programme.desc: The Golden Age: Shah Jahan's reign ushered in the golden age of Mughal architecture. During this time the splendour of the Mughal court reached its peak. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: A look at the Fuehrer's fascination with propaganda, which began in the trenches of World War One.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: The decade of propaganda, impassioned speeches, newspaper articles, posters and campaigning that led to one moment - Hitler being made Chancellor of Germany in 1933.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: As Hitler's ambitions spread beyond Germany, the world drew toward another great war. This one would be fought on many battlefields and for the hearts and minds of the people.

programme.title: Hunt for the Oldest DNA
programme.desc: For decades, scientists have tried to unlock the secrets of ancient DNA. But life's genetic blueprint is incredibly fragile, and researchers have struggled to find genetic material in fossils that has survived for millions of years. Then, one maverick scientist had the controversial idea of looking for DNA not in fossils or frozen ancient tissue - but in the soil.

programme.title: Weathered: Earth's Extremes
programme.desc: Positive climate tipping points; a supercomputer in Cheyenne, Wyo., shows how climate systems are predicted and analysed; a Michigan coal plant makes progress in the transition to renewables; climate challenges and vulnerabilities across the U.S.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: We meet Billy Robinson, a man who recruited every top villain and fighter in Newcastle to work as doormen.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernie talks to Danny Woollard and Angelo 'Festus' Hayman, two men who carried out the Snow Hill Robbery in 1995.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Bernie attempts to answer the age-old question, Does crime pay?

programme.title: Gangster No. 1: The Freddie Foreman Story
programme.desc: Attached to almost every unsolved gangland murder in London over the last 50 years, Freddie Foreman is the `Godfather' of Britain's criminal underworld. Foreman reveals the audacious details of the heists, double crossings, shootouts, murders and betrayals he was involved in, and ultimately, what has made him `Gangster Number.1'.

programme.title: The Feared: Irish Gangsters
programme.desc: True crime author Bernard O'Mahoney returns to his home country to shine a light on the Irish underworld. With exclusive access to high-profile Irish `faces', he enters uncharted territory when he discovers that there may be more to these crimes than meets the eye. He travels around the country through the workings of a dark criminal underworld with stories of extreme violence, poverty, and ultimately, the devastating consequences they bring.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar - The Columbian Cartel King
Crisis in Cocaine Valley
programme.desc: Revealing how the covid crisis has led to the near extinction of the massive cocaine production sites deep in the rainforest of the Peruvian Andes.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran London's East End.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: In the Roaring Twenties, Al Capone ruled an empire of crime in the Windy City: gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, bribery, narcotics trafficking, robbery, protection rackets, and murder. It seemed that law enforcement couldn't touch him, until one fatal night in 1929.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: The chilling secrets of the Mafia's most notorious kingpins are exposed in this compelling series. Mobster Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano's crimes with the Mafia, including bribing high-ranking officials, got him 50 years in jail. However, when WWII broke out, the USA needed Luciano's help.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on notorious mobsters. Joe Colombo loved fame and money and took on the FBI in the 70s, with his Italian-American Civil Rights League campaigning against harassment.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ambitious John Gotti became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head and earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.sub-title: Tony Spilotro - The Las Vegas Enforcer
programme.desc: Enforcer Tony `The Ant' Spilotro left dozens of bodies in his wake as he protected the Chicago Outfit's interests in Vegas casinos. Soon he became a target of the FBI and the Mob.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Tales of real-life crime told by the FBI. Vito Genovese dealt with disloyalty ruthlessly and rose through the Mafia ranks, but he was to cause his own downfall with a massive error.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Carmine Galante took the Mob into the world of heroin and even when locked up in jail, Galente still managed to control the streets and profit from his drug empire.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as mobster `Donnie Brasco', reveals how his undercover work led to over 100 convictions.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: The death of Peppino Impastato in 1978 was dismissed by police as a random act. But he was an anti-Mafia activist. Were the people behind his death sheltered by the Mafia?

programme.title: Twilight of the Yakuza
programme.desc: The Yakuza are deeply rooted in Japanese society, but they are a dying breed. Known for crimes like extortion and murder, they also hold their own rigorous code of honour but a government crackdown is threatening their continued existence.

programme.title: Migratory Birds

programme.desc: These child prodigies of the animal kingdom have feathers and beaks, plus very special skills. The Keas in New Zealand test their brains, solving puzzles and challenging tourists. They unscrew bottle-tops and dismantle windscreen wiper blades.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses & Dingos
programme.desc: Snowy Mountains wild horses adapt to predators, neighbors, and harsh but nourishing conditions.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses & Dingos

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses & Dingos

programme.title: Lions On The Move

programme.desc: The electric catfish and electric ray use shocks to attack their victims, while elephants and kangaroos fight with their feet.

programme.title: Animal Armoury

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next

programme.title: Discovering Music

programme.title: Pavarotti - A Voice for the Ages
programme.desc: Half a million people flocked to hear the maestro in Central Park and millions worldwide watched on television. programme.title: Sir Bryn Terfel And Friends: Songs Of The Sea
Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: On a long drive through the desert, a couple get their car serviced and are handed an extortionate bill. But they plan on turning the tables.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Brenda, a lonely alcoholic, is delighted when she bumps into an old friend from university. But does he have an ulterior motive for seeing her?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Robert Smythe has a dark secret he has kept for 20 years but it has now come back to haunt him. Can he keep it a secret from his wife?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Colonel George Peregrine's comfortable life is disturbed when his wife writes a best selling raunchy novel. Is this evidence that she's having an affair?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When wealthy Prince Zawi gives surgeon Robert Sandy a diamond for saving his life, the doctor finds that his new jewel is really more of a liability than an asset.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After a mild-mannered man commits a strangulation, he becomes a juror in the trial of the man accused of the crime.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A paralysed woman (Phyllis Thaxter) must somehow communicate her husband is a killer before she becomes his next victim.

programme.title: Ian Fleming The Curse Of Bond: The Spy Who killed me
Jean-Michel Jarre Live In Sevilla
programme.desc: Jean-Michel Jarre unveils an immersive concert-show in the heart of Seville's sumptuous Plaza de España, transformed into an exceptional stage setting for one evening.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Endless Harmony
programme.desc: Documentary about the pioneering surf and harmony band featuring interviews with the surviving Boys, archive footage and a soundtrack full of hits.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a séance for a writer suffering from writers block but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife which leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current wife of five years.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song By Song
programme.desc: Country singing sensation Dolly Parton looks back at her song "I Will Always Love You" and tells stories of its creation and meaning.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song By Song
programme.sub-title: It's All Wrong, But It's All Right
programme.desc: Country singing sensation Dolly Parton looks back at her song "It's All Wrong, But It's All Right" and tells stories of its creation and meaning.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Craig Morgan, Steven Curtis Chapman, Rhonda Vincent, Sal Gonzalez
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Bootsy Collins at Jazz a Vienne
programme.desc: Bringing the best in music and television.

programme.title: Record On
programme.desc: The story behind The Specials' self-titled 1979 debut album, produced by singer-songwriter Elvis Costello, that many believe to have been a defining moment in the UK ska scene.

programme.title: Record On
programme.desc: The story behind The Specials' self-titled 1979 debut album, produced by singer-songwriter Elvis Costello, that many believe to have been a defining moment in the UK ska scene.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin is a Milwaukee realtor who receives a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime whom he left for dead. He now finds himself thrust back into a world of ruthless hit men and double-crosses that turn his open houses into deadly war zones.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: In 14th Century Switzerland, a once peaceful hunter leads his people in rebellion after his family and country are threatened by a tyrannical Austrian King. As the Holy Roman Empire crumbles, the quiet lives of the Swiss peasants are upended.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One man's brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after it's revealed he's a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: SAS: Red Notice
programme.desc: A groom's wedding plans are disrupted when a small army of well-trained criminals, led by Laszlo Antonov, hijack the Eurostar deep beneath the English Channel.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An ageing hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they are being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team, with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: Ace assassin Arthur Bishop becomes a target when he agrees to teach reckless Steve the art of contract killing.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Mikaela and Sam once again join forces with Optimus Prime again to save Earth from ruthless robot The Fallen.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: In 14th Century Switzerland, a once peaceful hunter leads his people in rebellion after his family and country are threatened by a tyrannical Austrian King. As the Holy Roman Empire crumbles, the quiet lives of the Swiss peasants are upended.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Two high-school nerds accidentally create the woman of their dreams when an electrical storm zaps their home computer.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Megan and Noah uncover a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating spiral of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: Hostages
programme.desc: Comedy thriller about five strangers caught in an unfolding terrorism situation. Language. (2025, 90 mins)

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designer's plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: A special agent recruits former models Derek Zoolander and Hansel to save the world's most beautiful people from a deadly plot.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owner's kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isn't invited to the ceremony, but he's determined not to be left out.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other people's weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, he's about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Two high-school nerds accidentally create the woman of their dreams when an electrical storm zaps their home computer.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List' explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lee's charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Ólafur Jóhann Ólafsson.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Göring.

programme.title: Lee
programme.desc: The story of photographer Elizabeth `Lee' Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this film, set during World War II, tells the story of the all-female baseball league that was started while the American men were away fighting in Europe. After a team of potential players has been recruited, former player Jimmy Dugan coaches the girls and prepares them for the World Series.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Ólafur Jóhann Ólafsson.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two children move to a new town, they soon discover that they have a connection to the original Ghostbusters and their grandfather's secret legacy.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: Perennial family favourite about Dorothy, a young girl from the American Midwest, who is swept by a cyclone to a magical kingdom over the rainbow. There she meets a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who join her on a quest to find the all-powerful Wizard of Oz, the only man who can help her get back to to Kansas. However, the Wicked Witch of the West has other plans for Dorothy and her new friends.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her family's manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce. (2026)

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didn't know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaad's bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents' choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthur's loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wife's infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. They're led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Frank's ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Cable Guy

programme.desc: How plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Running across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, seeing insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: In the grasslands of southern Kalahari stands a 200 year old Acacia. In this arid landscape the Camelthorn is a sanctuary for big and small. Sociable weavers, Bruchid beetles and various mammals make use of this iconic tree.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Horizons
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: On the first day of spring in Australia, spring fever runs rife as kangaroos box, koalas woo, and a surprisingly fast perentie lizard seeks out its weekly meal.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Follows a group of professional snake catchers on Queensland's Sunshine Coast as they go head-to-head with some of the planet's deadliest snakes.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit

programme.desc: Suzi Perry presents highlights of the Canadian Grand Prix. Red Bull's Sebastian Vettel turned pole position into a dominant victory 12 months ago in Montreal, but he has been overshadowed by the dominant Mercedes team so far this year. Lewis Hamilton would have been expecting to continue his good form at a track where he has won three times before, including his debut victory in Formula 1 in 2007.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Angus wants a garden that reminds him of his favourite holiday destination, Cyprus. Currently, he hates his awkwardly shaped plot and absolutely loathes the domineering dark grey retaining wall, which he thinks makes the space look like a prison yard. Angus loves to barbecue and would like a generous, Cypriot-inspired space where he can entertain his friends. He is also keen to try and grow his own produce. Can Flo and Lee make his Mediterranean island dreams come true with a budget of £6,000?

programme.title: Garden Rescue

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh heads to Birmingham to surprise Georgie Moseley - the founder of Britain's first cancer drop-in centre. Dedicated to her son Harry, who she sadly lost to brain cancer when he was just 11, the Drop In Centre provides support to families coping with a cancer diagnosis. At Georgie's home, inspired by where the Moseley family spent their final holiday together with Harry, the team transforms her grim backyard into an Ibizan-style hideaway full of happy reminders of Harry.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Where's the Ring?!; The Case of the Missing Car; Totaled Friendship!
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-fiancee for the cost of an engagement ring, but she says he took it with him when he moved out; a mechanic says his drug problem didn't contribute to the theft of a car; a woman sues a longtime former friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Limo Driver Thief?; $50,000 Truck Custody Battle; Burn Baby Burn!
programme.desc: A woman is accused of damaging a limo and stealing customer fares; ex-lovers get into trouble with the judge when they can't stop arguing with each other in court; a woman says her car was burned to the ground at a former friend's auto repair shop.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Homeless Squatter on the Hot Seat?!; Runaway Cow Collision!
programme.desc: A tenant who failed to pay rent sues his ex-roommate for illegal eviction and disposing of his property; a motorist who hit a runaway cow sues the animal's owner for damages to his vehicle.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Newlywed Rings Ripped Off?!; Fire Rescue Heroics?
programme.desc: Items go missing after a landlord lets a handyman change an apartment lock without supervision; a neighbour is accused of starting a fire and damaging property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Exposed Gun Goof!; Secret Love Affair Exposed!

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Shot in the Knee!; Save My Business!
programme.desc: A man denies shooting a friend on a camping trip and says she is exaggerating her suffering; a woman sues a former friend for repayment of a loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman says her landlord evicted her for asking for help with a mould infestation; metal rods a man put in the ground to prevent cars from parking on his lawn damage a woman's car.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Did the Drug Addict Do It?!; Love or Obsession?
programme.desc: When property goes missing, a woman's roommate says she warned her to lock her door; a waitress says she found photos of herself all over a patron's apartment.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A teen who got drunk, stole his girlfriend's car and broke his neck in a crash accuses his girlfriend's mother of buying him alcohol; a woman accuses her ex-lover of keeping her property and threatening her.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Litigants must provide evidence to settle a car purchase dispute. A dog walk turns into a scary attack when a neighbour's dogs run wild.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Ex-Girlfriend vs. the Truck!; Nightmare Tenant?

programme.title: Mediterranean With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon continues his journey in Libya, a country well off the tourist trail and torn apart by revolution, insurgents from the so-called Islamic State and western air strikes. Heading deep into the desert, the backdrop for scenes in the `Star Wars' films, Simon visits the fortress village of Chenini.

programme.title: Mediterranean With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Taking a ferry across the Strait of Gibraltar, Simon's first stop is Ceuta, a Spanish exclave surrounded by Morocco. programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The Miss United contest takes a dive when one of the beauty queens is discovered dead in the pool.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty Wainthropp's part time job in a post office leads to a fraud investigation, which uncovers the death of an elderly lady.

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: You Are Cordially Invited to an Assassination, Part 1
programme.desc: At Vicky and Cormac's wedding, Harry and Fergus interrupt an assassin's mission with drastic consequences.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Nikki travels to Mexico when her friend is killed in a carjacking and is soon on a collision course with danger.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Sandra Pullman is reunited with an old flame, DCI James Larson, when the team reinvestigate the murder of a respected antiques dealer. As Pullman and Larson rekindle their relationship, Brian Lane faces a domestic crisis - is Esther having an affair?

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: With the assistance of Detective Kristin Sims, Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd investigates a wide range of murder mysteries in Brokenwood, a small town in the countryside of New Zealand.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: With the assistance of Detective Kristin Sims, Detective Inspector Mike Shepherd investigates a wide range of murder mysteries in Brokenwood, a small town in the countryside of New Zealand.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: A spokesman argues for independence for Ruislip, and a notorious film comes in for some mockery in Last Mango in Paris.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Classic sketches and skits with Ronnies Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Walk In Love, Sid and Lil, George and Eddie, and Yes Man.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at bizarre hybrids within the animal kingdom, including the pizzly bear which is a cross between a polar bear and a grizzly, which has come into existence because of global warming.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on their first Latin American adventure as they take a boat ride in the Argentine jungle. There is gin and tonic with some remote Anglo Argentines, hummingbirds, honey, and a spot of tango.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy and Prunella navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece of the waterways, up along the coast of Morecambe Bay and visiting Carnforth and Lune Aqueduct. This is a very personal voyage for Pru, whose family lived in the area.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on an epic adventure along Canada's Rideau Canal, a world heritage site. Tim and Pru follow its 125-mile course, from the backwoods of Ontario, all the way to Canada's capital.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on one last great overseas adventure. The intrepid and self-confessed `ancient mariners' head for South East Asia and the canals and waterways of Vietnam and Cambodia.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on their first Latin American adventure as they take a boat ride in the Argentine jungle. There is gin and tonic with some remote Anglo Argentines, hummingbirds, honey, and a spot of tango.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy and Prunella navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece of the waterways, up along the coast of Morecambe Bay and visiting Carnforth and Lune Aqueduct. This is a very personal voyage for Pru, whose family lived in the area.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: From the Andes peaks we follow the path of the relentless wind, sweeping east through Patagonia's dry desert. We discover a weird world of maras - giant guinea pigs and desert dwelling penguins, and witness the first faltering steps of baby guanacos - Patagonia's very own camels.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring coastline, 4000 miles long. From the cold, fearsome waters of Cape Horn - where brave rockhopper penguins overcome huge challenges to raise their young; to the far north, with huge elephant seals battling for position in the heat of the desert.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Dr Lucy Worsley investigates the dark history of our curious relationship with killing, beginning with notorious real-life crimes of the first half of the nineteenth century, and how these murders were transformed into popular entertainments.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Dr Lucy Worsley explores how real life crime, science and the emerging art of detection had an influence on the popular culture of homicide during the Victorian Age.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explores the Edwardian era and the golden age of detective fiction between the wars - the time of Dr Crippen, Agatha Christie and the films of Alfred Hitchcock.

programme.title: Agatha Christie Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Historian Lucy Worsley investigates the complex factors that shaped the dark imagination of a refined Devonshire lady, discovering family secrets and a childhood haunted by a sinister figure.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: On the evening of 3 December 1926, Agatha Christie left her home in Sunningdale, Berkshire, in her Morris Cowley. The next morning, the car was found abandoned, balanced precariously on the edge of a quarry.

programme.title: River Walks

programme.desc: An opportunity arises for Del to make his fortune, but a missing statue and gang warfare create problems.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del introduces the Dresden collecting aristocracy to some North Korean porcelain and his chandelier cleaning service.

programme.desc: Del ropes in a reluctant Rodney and Grandad as he tries to turn Trotter Watch Security and Trotter's Ethnic Tours into big business.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal
programme.desc: A former teacher with a dream to set up an educational app is tricked into a business partnership with a wealthy neighbour that will see him lose almost everything.

programme.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee
programme.desc: When police get word of a woman being swept off her boat by a rogue wave in Newport Beach, Calif., search teams race to find her before it's too late. Detectives soon suspect that rough seas weren't the real culprit.

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: The Death Cleaners help Lindsey after her mother and extended family leave everything they don't want at her house, causing her to lose her personal style.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
